mapper.select:
select count(*) from sms_role
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
select id, name, description, create_time AS createTime, status from sms_role where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sms_role (name, description, create_time, status) values (#{name}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, pid, name, value, url, status, create_time AS createTime, sort, type from sms_permission order by pid, sort
select id, pid, name, value, url, status, create_time AS createTime, sort, type from sms_permission where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sms_permission (pid, name, value, url, status, create_time, sort, type) values (#{pid}, #{name}, #{value}, #{url}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{sort}, #{type})
mapper.select: select permission_id from sms_role_permission_relation where role_id = #{roleId}
